plan_title: Google Drive Invoice Summary Email Agent
plan_description: Reads invoice files from a specific Google Drive folder, extracts key invoice details, and emails a summary to you using Gmail.

data: - Use the Google Drive folder at https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1TAUlds9R8r2lznDszbOwovpdM0cN7aFK as the only source location for invoices.
- Consider files in that folder as candidate invoices, prioritizing common invoice formats (PDF first; also allow image files like JPG/PNG if present).
- For each candidate file, retrieve the file name and basic file details (for example: last updated date) to include in the summary when helpful.
actions: - List files in the specified Google Drive folder (non-recursive by default).
- For each file, extract invoice fields using deterministic document extraction.
- Extract these default invoice fields when available: vendor/supplier name, invoice number, invoice date, due date, total amount, currency, and tax/VAT amount.
- If a field is missing or unreadable on an invoice, leave it blank and add a short note for that invoice (for example: "Missing invoice number").
- Create a roll-up summary across all invoices found: count of invoices, total sum of invoice totals (when totals are available), and a list of any invoices with missing key fields.
- If no invoices are found in the folder, send an email stating that no invoices were found and include the folder link.
output: - Produce an email-ready summary that includes:
- A short header with the folder link and the number of invoices found.
- A simple table listing one row per invoice with: file name, vendor, invoice #, invoice date, due date, total, currency, and notes.
- A totals section (for example: total invoices, sum of totals, and a short list of exceptions such as missing totals or missing invoice numbers).
delivery: - Send the summary email using Gmail.
- Use a clear subject line such as: "Invoice summary from Google Drive folder".
- Put the table directly in the email body (HTML table) so it is readable without downloading anything.
processing_steps: - Open the Google Drive folder provided by the user.
- List the files in the folder (non-recursive).
- For each file, extract invoice fields (vendor, invoice number, dates, totals).
- Normalize extracted values for consistency (for example: date format and currency/amount formatting).
- Build a per-invoice table plus roll-up totals and exceptions.
- Send the summary email via Gmail to the user.
